metadata.title: MIDIAccess Interface (MDN Reference)
metadata.summary: MDN reference for MIDIAccess: inputs/outputs maps, sysexEnabled, and the statechange event.

description: The MIDIAccess interface of the Web MIDI API provides methods for listing MIDI input and output devices, and obtaining access to those devices.
availability: Limited availability This feature is not Baseline because it does not work in some of the most widely-used browsers.

instance_properties.name: inputs
instance_properties.description: Returns an instance of MIDIInputMap which provides access to any available MIDI input ports.

instance_properties.name: outputs
instance_properties.description: Returns an instance of MIDIOutputMap which provides access to any available MIDI output ports.

instance_properties.name: sysexEnabled
instance_properties.description: A boolean attribute indicating whether system exclusive support is enabled on the current MIDIAccess instance.

events: Called whenever a new MIDI port is added or an existing port changes state.
examples: navigator.requestMIDIAccess().then((access) => { // Get lists of available MIDI controllers const inputs = access.inputs.values(); const outputs = access.outputs.values(); access.onstatechange = (event) => { // Print information about the (dis)connected MIDI controller console.log(event.port.name, event.port.manufacturer, event.port.state); }; });
